reason: Root Rust gateway runtime conventions and quality gates.
Keep managed runtime failure handling separate from provider attempt and circuit accounting.
Keep runtime DTOs, commands, generated bindings, and frontend consumers aligned.
Map source download, verification, process ownership, bridge, events, and UI-facing status boundaries.
Reuse existing bounded download, extraction, CLI path, and process helpers.
External source layout, execution contract, UI restore behavior, and reviewed SHA evidence.
